game.twenty_four.controls: [←]/[→] Move Cursor [C] Toggle Number/Symbol Mode [↑]/[↓] Swap Numbers [1]/[+] Plus / Set Positive [2]/[-] Minus / Set Negative [3]/[*] Multiply [4]/[/] Divide [Space] Clear Current Position [Z] Add Parentheses [X] Remove Parentheses [P] Change Difficulty [R] Restart [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.twenty_four.description: Use the four given numbers and the operators + - * / and parentheses to form an expression that equals 24.
game.twenty_four.details:
f%The 24 game. Combine numbers using basic operators to calculate 24.

{tc:yellow}Items:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}+ - * / (){tc:clear} Basic operators

{tc:yellow}Modes:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Symbol Mode{tc:clear} Place operators + - * /
{tc:light_cyan}Parentheses Mode{tc:clear} Add or remove ()
{tc:light_cyan}Number Mode{tc:clear} Adjust number positions and signs

{tc:yellow}Difficulty:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Classic Mode{tc:clear} Only positive numbers
{tc:light_cyan}Fixed Negative Mode{tc:clear} Includes positive and negative numbers, signs cannot be changed
{tc:light_cyan}Adjustable Negative Mode{tc:clear} Includes positive and negative numbers, signs can be changed

{tc:yellow}Press P to change difficulty:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Mode{tc:clear} 1-3 mode

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}[←]/[→]{tc:clear} Move cursor
{tc:light_cyan}[C]{tc:clear} Toggle number/symbol mode
{tc:light_cyan}[↑]/[↓]{tc:clear} Swap numbers
{tc:light_cyan}[1]/[+]{tc:clear} Plus / Set number positive
{tc:light_cyan}[2]/[-]{tc:clear} Minus / Set number negative
{tc:light_cyan}[3]/[*]{tc:clear} Multiply
{tc:light_cyan}[4]/[/]{tc:clear} Divide
{tc:light_cyan}[Space]{tc:clear} Clear current position
{tc:light_cyan}[Z]{tc:clear} Add parentheses
{tc:light_cyan}[X]{tc:clear} Remove parentheses
{tc:light_cyan}[P]{tc:clear} Change difficulty
{tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
{tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.twenty_four.err_paren_duplicate: This pair of parentheses already exists.
game.twenty_four.err_paren_order: Please enter different coordinates, and left coordinate must be less than right.
game.twenty_four.err_paren_single: Parentheses must cover at least two numbers and one operator.
game.twenty_four.err_remove_paren: No parentheses of that color to remove.
game.twenty_four.name: 24 Points
game.twenty_four.prompt_add_paren: Add Parentheses: Enter X Y (1-8), press Enter to confirm
game.twenty_four.prompt_difficulty: Set Difficulty: 1 Classic / 2 Fixed Negative / 3 Adjustable Negative
game.twenty_four.ready: Automatically evaluates when all four symbols are filled.
